# Tencent RTC

> Tencent RTC is a one-stop real-time audio/video solution covering Instant Messaging (Chat UIKit), Audio/Video Calling (TUICallKit), Live Streaming & Voice Chat (LiveKit), Video Conferencing (TUIRoomKit), and the underlying RTC Engine SDK.
> It supports Android, iOS, Flutter, React, Vue, uni-app and more, with pre-built UI components for rapid integration.

## Docs

- [AI Agent Real-Time Communication Onboarding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/quick-start.md): Set up AI Agent environment from scratch, integrate Tencent RTC SDKs (Chat/Call/Live/Room/TRTC) via Cursor/VS Code + MCP Server to build IM, calls, live streaming and conferencing apps.
- [Configure MCP Server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/mcp.md): Add Tencent RTC MCP Server configuration in Cursor/VS Code, set SDKAppID and SDKSecretKey environment variables to enable Chat/Call/Live/Room/TRTC tool capabilities.
- [Configure RTC Skills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/skills.md): Configure AI Agent's RTC Skills package to load Chat UIKit, TUICallKit, LiveKit, RoomKit, TRTC Engine integration capabilities and best practice rules.

### Chat UIKit
> IM chat components with conversation list, chat window, contact management and full messaging capabilities.

- [Troubleshoot Android Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/android/faq.md): Resolve build errors, initialization failures and runtime exceptions in Android TUIKit Compose integration.
- [Customize Android Chat UIKit Theme](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/android/features/theme.md): Customize Android chat UI theme colors, dark mode and visual styles via TUIKit Compose.
- [Integrate Android Chat UIKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/android/integration.md): Integrate TUIKit Compose chat components in Android, using ChatPage, ConversationsPage, ContactsPage to build IM apps. Requires Android Studio Ladybug 2024.2.1+, JDK 17+.
- [Troubleshoot Android IM SDK Init & Login Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/android_sdk/client-api.md): Resolve V2TIMManager.getInstance().initSDK() initialization failures and login() exceptions in Android IM SDK.
- [Chat UIKit Billing & Edition Selection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/common/product.md): Compare Chat UIKit free vs paid editions, billing models and upgrade paths.
- [Chat UIKit Server Error Code Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/common/server_error_code.md): Look up Chat UIKit server REST API error codes to identify API call failure causes.
- [Troubleshoot Chat UIKit Server Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/common/server.md): Resolve Chat UIKit server REST API call failures, callback configuration and push notification issues.
- [Troubleshoot Flutter IM SDK Init & Login Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/flutter_sdk/client-api.md): Resolve TencentImSDKPlugin initialization failures and login exceptions in Flutter IM SDK.
- [Troubleshoot Flutter Chat UIKit Issues (SDK Layer)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/flutter_sdk/faq.md): Resolve Flutter Chat UIKit SDK-level dependency conflicts, build errors and compatibility issues.
- [Troubleshoot iOS IM SDK Init & Login Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/ios_sdk/client-api.md): Resolve V2TIMManager initialization failures and login exceptions in iOS IM SDK.
- [Web Chat UIKit Error Code Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/web_sdk/error_code.md): Look up Web IM SDK error codes to quickly identify initialization, login and message sending failures.
- [Troubleshoot Web Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/web_sdk/faq.md): Resolve browser compatibility, bundling and runtime issues in Web Chat UIKit (@tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react/vue3).
- [Troubleshoot Flutter Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/flutter/faq.md): Resolve dependency conflicts, build errors and runtime exceptions in Flutter TUIKit integration.
- [Customize Flutter Chat UIKit Theme](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/flutter/features/theme.md): Customize Flutter TUIKit chat UI theme colors, dark mode and visual styles.
- [Integrate Flutter Chat UIKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/flutter/integration.md): Clone TUIKit_Flutter from GitHub, use ChatPage, ConversationsPage, ContactsPage to build cross-platform IM apps. Requires Flutter 3.29.0+, Dart 3.7.0+.
- [Troubleshoot iOS Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/ios/faq.md): Resolve compilation and runtime issues in iOS TUIChat_Swift/TUIConversation_Swift CocoaPods integration.
- [Customize iOS Chat UIKit Theme](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/ios/features/theme.md): Customize iOS TUIChat_Swift chat UI theme colors, dark mode and visual styles.
- [Integrate iOS Chat UIKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/ios/integration.md): Install TUIChat_Swift, TUIConversation_Swift, TUIContact_Swift via CocoaPods to build iOS IM apps. Requires Xcode 10+, iOS 9.0+.
- [React ChatHeader Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/chat-header.md): Customize the ChatHeader component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react with title, avatar and action buttons.
- [React ChatSetting Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/chat-setting.md): Customize the ChatSetting component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react for muting, pinning and clearing chat.
- [React Chat UIKit Component List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/component-list.md): View all @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react components: UIKitProvider, ConversationList, Chat, MessageList, ContactList, Search, etc.
- [React ContactList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/contact-list.md): Customize the ContactList component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react for friends and group lists.
- [React ConversationActions Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/conversation-actions.md): Customize ConversationActions from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react for delete, pin, mute operations.
- [React ConversationList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/conversation-list.md): Customize the ConversationList component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react with search, create and pin.
- [React ConversationPreview Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/conversation-preview.md): Customize the ConversationPreview component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react with unread count and last message.
- [React ConversationSearch Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/conversation-search.md): Customize the ConversationSearch component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react to search users, groups and messages.
- [React MessageInput Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/message-input.md): Customize the MessageInput component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react with emoji, image, file sending.
- [React MessageList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/message-list.md): Customize the MessageList component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react with bubble styles and interactions.
- [React Search Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/components/search.md): Customize the Search component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react to search contacts, groups and chat history.
- [Troubleshoot React Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/faq.md): Resolve dependency conflicts, TypeScript errors and rendering issues in @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react integration.
- [Integrate React Chat UIKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/react/integration.md): npm install @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react, use UIKitProvider, ConversationList, Chat, MessageList components to build React IM apps. Requires React 18, Node.js 18+.
- [Vue ChatHeader Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/chat-header.md): Customize the ChatHeader component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 with title, avatar and action buttons.
- [Vue ChatSetting Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/chat-setting.md): Customize the ChatSetting component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 for muting, pinning and clearing chat.
- [Vue Chat UIKit Component List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/component-list.md): View all @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 components: UIKitProvider, ConversationList, Chat, MessageList, ContactList, Search, etc.
- [Vue ContactList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/contact-list.md): Customize the ContactList component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 for friends and group lists.
- [Vue ConversationActions Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/conversation-actions.md): Customize ConversationActions from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 for delete, pin, mute operations.
- [Vue ConversationList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/conversation-list.md): Customize the ConversationList component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 with search, create and pin.
- [Vue ConversationPreview Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/conversation-preview.md): Customize the ConversationPreview component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 with unread count and last message.
- [Vue ConversationSearch Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/conversation-search.md): Customize the ConversationSearch component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 to search users, groups and messages.
- [Vue MessageInput Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/message-input.md): Customize the MessageInput component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 with emoji, image, file sending.
- [Vue MessageList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/message-list.md): Customize the MessageList component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 with bubble styles and interactions.
- [Vue Search Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/components/search.md): Customize the Search component from @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 to search contacts, groups and chat history.
- [Troubleshoot Vue Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/faq.md): Resolve dependency conflicts, TypeScript errors and rendering issues in @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3 integration.
- [Integrate Vue Chat UIKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/vue/integration.md): npm install @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-vue3, use UIKitProvider, ConversationList, Chat, MessageList components to build Vue3 IM apps. Requires Vue 3.0+, Node.js 20+.


### TUICallKit
> Audio/video calling components for WeChat-style one-to-one and group calls.

- [Troubleshoot Android TUICallKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/android/faq.md): Resolve audio/video permissions, call connection failures and UI issues in Android tuicallkit-kt integration.
- [Integrate Android TUICallKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/android/integration.md): Clone TUIKit_Android from GitHub, import tuicallkit-kt and atomic_x modules for audio/video calling. Includes TRTC SDK and IM SDK. Requires Android 5.0+.
- [Android TUICallObserver Callback API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/faq/android_sdk/call-observer-api.md): View Android TUICallObserver callback APIs: onCallReceived, onCallCancelled, onUserJoin, etc.
- [Android TUICallKit API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/faq/android_sdk/callkit-api.md): View complete Android tuicallkit-kt API: call(), groupCall(), joinInGroupCall(), setSelfInfo() methods.
- [TUICallKit Error Code Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/faq/common/error_code.md): Look up TUICallKit error codes to identify issues in call initiation, answering and hang-up.
- [Flutter TUICallKit Type Definitions Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/faq/flutter_sdk/call-define-api.md): View Flutter tencent_calls_uikit data structures: TUICallParams, TUICallMediaType, TUICallRole type definitions.
- [Flutter TUICallObserver Callback API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/faq/flutter_sdk/call-observer-api.md): View Flutter tencent_calls_uikit TUICallObserver call event callback API documentation.
- [Flutter TUICallKit API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/faq/flutter_sdk/callkit-api.md): View complete Flutter tencent_calls_uikit API: call(), groupCall(), setSelfInfo(), enableFloatWindow() methods.
- [iOS TUICallObserver Callback API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/faq/ios_sdk/call-observer-api.md): View iOS TUICallKit_Swift TUICallObserver call event callback API documentation.
- [iOS TUICallKit API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/faq/ios_sdk/callkit-api.md): View complete iOS TUICallKit_Swift/Professional API: call(), groupCall(), setSelfInfo() methods.
- [Troubleshoot Flutter TUICallKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/flutter/faq.md): Resolve platform adaptation, permission and build issues in Flutter tencent_calls_uikit integration.
- [Integrate Flutter TUICallKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/flutter/integration.md): Run flutter pub add tencent_calls_uikit to install Flutter audio/video calling component. Requires Flutter 3.24.0+, Dart 3.5.0+.
- [Troubleshoot iOS TUICallKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/ios/faq.md): Resolve compilation errors and call issues in iOS TUICallKit_Swift/Professional CocoaPods integration.
- [Integrate iOS TUICallKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/ios/integration.md): Install pod 'TUICallKit_Swift/Professional' via CocoaPods to build iOS audio/video calling app. Requires Xcode 13+, iOS 13.0+.
- [React TUICallKit API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/react/api.md): View complete @trtc/calls-uikit-react API: TUICallKitAPI.init(), TUICallKitAPI.calls(), CallMediaType enum.
- [Troubleshoot React TUICallKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/react/faq.md): Resolve component rendering, call connection and browser compatibility issues in @trtc/calls-uikit-react integration.
- [Integrate React TUICallKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/react/integration.md): npm install @trtc/calls-uikit-react, use TUICallKit component and TUICallKitAPI.calls() for React audio/video calling. Requires React 18, Node.js 22+.
- [Vue TUICallKit API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/vue/api.md): View complete @trtc/calls-uikit-vue API: TUICallKitAPI.init(), TUICallKitAPI.calls(), CallMediaType enum.
- [Troubleshoot Vue TUICallKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/vue/faq.md): Resolve component rendering, call connection and browser compatibility issues in @trtc/calls-uikit-vue integration.
- [Integrate Vue TUICallKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/tuicallkit/vue/integration.md): npm install @trtc/calls-uikit-vue, use TUICallKit component and TUICallKitAPI.calls() for Vue3 audio/video calling. Requires Vue 3.0+, Node.js 22+.


### LiveKit
> Live streaming and voice chat room components with host broadcasting, audience viewing, co-hosting, PK battles, barrage and gifts.

- [View LiveKit Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/faq/common/error_code.md): View LiveKit error code list and troubleshooting guide.
- [Integrate Android Live Audience List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-audience-list.md): Use AudienceStore API to fetch online audience list, display avatar wall and real-time audience count.
- [Integrate Android LiveKit Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-audio-effect.md): Use AudioEffectStore.setAudioChangerType(), setAudioReverbType() for voice changing (child/little girl/man) and reverb (KTV/hall/magnetic).
- [Integrate Android LiveKit Barrage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-barrage.md): Use BarrageStore.sendTextMessage(), sendCustomMessage() to send barrage, listen to barrageState for real-time messages.
- [Integrate Android LiveKit Basic Beauty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-base-beauty.md): Use BaseBeautyStore.setSmoothLevel(), setWhitenessLevel(), setRuddyLevel() to adjust smoothing/whitening/blushing (0-9 levels).
- [Integrate Android Audience Co-guest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-co-guest-interaction.md): Use CoGuestStore.requestConnection(), respondToCrossRoomConnection() for audience co-guest requests, host approval/rejection and interactions.
- [Integrate Android LiveKit Gift](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-gift.md): Use GiftStore.sendGift(), addGiftListener() for gift sending, fullscreen animations and barrage gift messages.
- [Integrate Android Host Co-hosting & PK](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-host-interaction.md): Use CoHostStore.requestConnection() for cross-room co-hosting, BattleStore.requestBattle() for PK battles.
- [Integrate Android LiveKit Basics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-integration.md): Clone TUIKit_Android from GitHub, integrate AtomicXCore, LoginStore, LiveCoreView for host streaming and audience viewing. Requires Android Studio Ladybug 2024.2.1+, JDK 17+.
- [Integrate Android LiveKit Room List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/android/live-live-list.md): Use RoomManager API to fetch room lists, room info, and implement room navigation with online status display.
- [Integrate Flutter Live Audience List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-audience-list.md): Use AudienceStore API to fetch online audience list, display avatar wall and real-time audience count.
- [Integrate Flutter LiveKit Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-audio-effect.md): Use AudioEffectStore.setAudioChangerType(), setAudioReverbType() for voice changing (child/little girl/man) and reverb (KTV/hall/magnetic).
- [Integrate Flutter LiveKit Barrage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-barrage.md): Use BarrageStore.sendTextMessage(), sendCustomMessage() to send barrage, listen to barrageState for real-time messages.
- [Integrate Flutter LiveKit Basic Beauty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-base-beauty.md): Use BaseBeautyStore.setSmoothLevel(), setWhitenessLevel(), setRuddyLevel() to adjust smoothing/whitening/blushing (0-9 levels).
- [Integrate Flutter Audience Co-guest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-co-guest-interaction.md): Use CoGuestStore.requestConnection(), respondToCrossRoomConnection() for audience co-guest requests, host approval/rejection and interactions.
- [Integrate Flutter LiveKit Gift](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-gift.md): Use GiftStore.sendGift(), addGiftListener() for gift sending, fullscreen animations and barrage gift messages.
- [Integrate Flutter Host Co-hosting & PK](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-host-interaction.md): Use CoHostStore.requestConnection() for cross-room co-hosting, BattleStore.requestBattle() for PK battles.
- [Integrate Flutter LiveKit Basics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-integration.md): Clone TUIKit_Flutter from GitHub, integrate AtomicXCore, LoginStore, LiveCoreView for host streaming and audience viewing. Requires Flutter 3.29.0+, Dart 3.7.0+.
- [Integrate Flutter LiveKit Room List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/flutter/live-live-list.md): Use RoomManager API to fetch room lists, room info, and implement room navigation with online status display.
- [Integrate iOS Live Audience List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-audience-list.md): Use AudienceStore API to fetch online audience list, display avatar wall and real-time audience count.
- [Integrate iOS LiveKit Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-audio-effect.md): Use AudioEffectStore.setAudioChangerType(), setAudioReverbType() for voice changing (child/little girl/man) and reverb (KTV/hall/magnetic).
- [Integrate iOS LiveKit Barrage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-barrage.md): Use BarrageStore.sendTextMessage(), sendCustomMessage() to send barrage, listen to barrageState for real-time messages.
- [Integrate iOS LiveKit Basic Beauty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-base-beauty.md): Use BaseBeautyStore.setSmoothLevel(), setWhitenessLevel(), setRuddyLevel() to adjust smoothing/whitening/blushing (0-9 levels).
- [Integrate iOS Audience Co-guest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-co-guest-interaction.md): Use CoGuestStore.requestConnection(), respondToCrossRoomConnection() for audience co-guest requests, host approval/rejection and interactions.
- [Integrate iOS LiveKit Gift](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-gift.md): Use GiftStore.sendGift(), addGiftListener() for gift sending, fullscreen animations and barrage gift messages.
- [Integrate iOS Host Co-hosting & PK](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-host-interaction.md): Use CoHostStore.requestConnection() for cross-room co-hosting, BattleStore.requestBattle() for PK battles.
- [Integrate iOS LiveKit Basics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-integration.md): Clone TUIKit_iOS from GitHub, integrate AtomicXCore, LoginStore, LiveCoreView for host streaming and audience viewing. Requires Xcode 13+, iOS 13.0+.
- [Integrate iOS LiveKit Room List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/ios/live-live-list.md): Use RoomManager API to fetch room lists, room info, and implement room navigation with online status display.
- [Vue Barrage Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/components/barrage.md): Customize TUILiveKit Barrage component for sending, receiving and styling barrage messages.
- [Vue CoGuestPanel Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/components/co-guest-panel.md): Customize TUILiveKit CoGuestPanel for managing audience co-guest requests, host approval and connection status.
- [Vue LiveAudienceList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/components/live-audience-list.md): Customize TUILiveKit LiveAudienceList component for online audience list and avatar wall display.
- [Vue LiveScenePanel Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/components/live-scene-panel.md): Customize TUILiveKit LiveScenePanel for configuring camera, screen, audio and other media resources.
- [Vue LiveView Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/components/live-view.md): Customize TUILiveKit LiveView component for live video stream rendering and playback parameters.
- [Vue StreamMixer Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/components/stream-mixer.md): Customize TUILiveKit StreamMixer for editing multi-stream layout and mixing parameters.
- [Troubleshoot Vue LiveKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/faq.md): Resolve component rendering, routing configuration and browser compatibility issues in Vue TUILiveKit integration.
- [Integrate Vue LiveKit Room List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/live-list-integration.md): Clone TUILiveKit from GitHub, integrate liveList component for room list display and navigation. Requires Vue 3.0+, Node.js 20+.
- [Integrate Vue LiveKit Desktop Viewing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/live-player-desk-integration.md): Clone TUILiveKit from GitHub, integrate livePlayer component for desktop audience viewing and co-guest interaction. Requires Vue 3.0+, Node.js 20+.
- [Integrate Vue LiveKit H5 Viewing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/live-player-h5-integration.md): Clone TUILiveKit from GitHub, integrate livePlayer component for H5 mobile audience viewing. Requires Vue 3.0+, Node.js 20+.
- [Integrate Vue LiveKit Host Streaming](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/live-pusher-integration.md): Clone TUILiveKit from GitHub, integrate livePusher component for host room creation and streaming. Requires Vue 3.0+, Node.js 20+.
- [Vue LiveKit State API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/vue/states/live-state.md): View TUILiveKit State API: roomState, barrageState, giftState, coGuestState, coHostState management interfaces.
- [Integrate Android Voice Room Audience List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/android/voice-audience-list.md): Use AudienceStore API to fetch voice room online audience list, display avatar wall and real-time audience count.
- [Integrate Android Voice Room Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/android/voice-audio-effect.md): Use AudioEffectStore.setAudioChangerType(), setAudioReverbType() for voice room voice changing (child/little girl/man) and reverb (KTV/hall/magnetic).
- [Integrate Android Voice Room Barrage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/android/voice-barrage.md): Use BarrageStore.sendTextMessage(), sendCustomMessage() to send voice room barrage, listen to barrageState for real-time messages.
- [Integrate Android Voice Room Co-Guest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/android/voice-co-guest-interaction.md): Use CoGuestStore.requestConnection(), respondToCrossRoomConnection() for voice room audience mic-on requests, host approval/rejection.
- [Integrate Android Voice Room Gift](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/android/voice-gift.md): Use GiftStore.sendGift(), addGiftListener() for voice room gift sending, fullscreen animations and barrage gift messages.
- [Integrate Android Voice Room Host Co-hosting & PK](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/android/voice-host-interaction.md): Use CoHostStore.requestConnection() for voice room cross-room co-hosting, BattleStore.requestBattle() for PK battles.
- [Integrate Android Voice Room Basics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/android/voice-integration.md): Clone TUIKit_Android from GitHub, integrate AtomicXCore, LoginStore, VoiceCoreView for host broadcasting and audience listening. Requires Android Studio Ladybug 2024.2.1+, JDK 17+.
- [Integrate Android Voice Room List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/android/voice-room-list.md): Use RoomManager API to fetch voice room list, room info, and implement room navigation with online status display.
- [Integrate Flutter Voice Room Co-Guest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/flutter/voice-co-guest-interaction.md): Use CoGuestStore.requestConnection(), respondToCrossRoomConnection() for voice room audience mic-on requests, host approval/rejection.
- [Integrate Flutter Voice Room Basics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/flutter/voice-integration.md): Clone TUIKit_Flutter from GitHub, integrate AtomicXCore, LoginStore, VoiceCoreView for host broadcasting and audience listening. Requires Flutter 3.29.0+, Dart 3.7.0+.
- [Integrate iOS Voice Room Audience List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/ios/voice-audience-list.md): Use AudienceStore API to fetch voice room online audience list, display avatar wall and real-time audience count.
- [Integrate iOS Voice Room Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/ios/voice-audio-effect.md): Use AudioEffectStore.setAudioChangerType(), setAudioReverbType() for voice room voice changing (child/little girl/man) and reverb (KTV/hall/magnetic).
- [Integrate iOS Voice Room Barrage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/ios/voice-barrage.md): Use BarrageStore.sendTextMessage(), sendCustomMessage() to send voice room barrage, listen to barrageState for real-time messages.
- [Integrate iOS Voice Room Co-Guest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/ios/voice-co-guest-interaction.md): Use CoGuestStore.requestConnection(), respondToCrossRoomConnection() for voice room audience mic-on requests, host approval/rejection.
- [Integrate iOS Voice Room Gift](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/ios/voice-gift.md): Use GiftStore.sendGift(), addGiftListener() for voice room gift sending, fullscreen animations and barrage gift messages.
- [Integrate iOS Voice Room Host Co-hosting & PK](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/ios/voice-host-interaction.md): Use CoHostStore.requestConnection() for voice room cross-room co-hosting, BattleStore.requestBattle() for PK battles.
- [Integrate iOS Voice Room Basics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/ios/voice-integration.md): Clone TUIKit_iOS from GitHub, integrate AtomicXCore, LoginStore, VoiceCoreView for host broadcasting and audience listening. Requires Xcode 13+, iOS 13.0+.
- [Integrate iOS Voice Room List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/ios/voice-room-list.md): Use RoomManager API to fetch voice room list, room info, and implement room navigation with online status display.


### TUIRoomKit
> Video conferencing components with multi-party meetings, screen sharing and participant management.

- [TUIRoomKit Error Code Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/faq/common/error_code.md): Look up TUIRoomKit error codes to quickly identify meeting creation, joining and device failure causes.
- [Troubleshoot Vue TUIRoomKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/faq.md): Resolve component rendering, device permission and browser compatibility issues in Vue TUIRoomKit (Atomicx) integration.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit In-Meeting Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/call-user-to-room.md): Use useRoomState API to send real-time meeting invitations to outside users, handle accept/reject and timeout.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit Device Detection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/device-detection.md): Use useDeviceState API for pre-meeting camera, microphone, speaker and network quality detection.
- [Manage Vue RoomKit Device State](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/device-state.md): Use useDeviceState API to manage camera, microphone, speaker on/off and switching in meetings.
- [Integrate Vue RoomKit Basic Beauty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/free-beauty-panel.md): Use TUIRoomKit free beauty panel for smoothing, whitening and blushing adjustment.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit In-Meeting Chat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/room-chat.md): Use useRoomChat API for in-meeting text, emoji, image real-time chat.
- [Manage Vue RoomKit Participants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/room-participant-state.md): Use useRoomParticipantState API to manage participant list, permissions, mute all and kick operations.
- [Manage Vue RoomKit Room Lifecycle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/room-state.md): Use useRoomState API to manage room lifecycle: create, join, leave, destroy and room info.
- [Render Vue RoomKit Video Layout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/room-view.md): Use useRoomView API for grid layout, sidebar layout and speaker mode video rendering.
- [Schedule Vue RoomKit Meeting Room](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/schedule-room.md): Use useRoomState API to create scheduled meetings with time, topic, password and participant list.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit Screen Sharing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/screen-share.md): Use useDeviceState API for screen sharing, system audio sharing and permission control.
- [Use Vue RoomKit Virtual Background](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/features/virtual-background.md): Use TUIRoomKit virtual background plugin for background blur and custom background images.
- [Integrate Vue TUIRoomKit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/vue/integration.md): Clone TUIRoomKit from GitHub, integrate home.vue device detection and room.vue conference pages. Requires Vue 3.4.21+, Node.js 18+.


### RTC Engine Web SDK
> TRTC Web SDK and plugin system providing core real-time audio/video capabilities and rich enhancement plugins.

- [TRTC Error Code Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/faq/common/error_code.md): Look up TRTC SDK error codes to quickly identify room entry, stream publishing/subscribing and device failure causes.
- [Troubleshoot Web TRTC Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/faq/web/web.md): Resolve device permissions, browser compatibility and autoplay policy issues in trtc-sdk-v5 integration.
- [TRTC Web SDK API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/api.md): View complete trtc-sdk-v5 API: TRTC.create(), enterRoom(), startLocalVideo(), publish() methods.
- [Integrate TRTC Web SDK Audio/Video Calling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/how_to_integrated_web_sdk.md): npm install trtc-sdk-v5, use TRTC.create(), enterRoom() for Web real-time audio/video calling. Requires Node.js 18+, WebRTC-supported browsers.
- [Run TRTC Web SDK Demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/how_to_run_web_sdk_demo.md): Clone TRTC-Simple-Demo repo, run trtc-sdk-v5 Demo locally to experience real-time audio/video calling.
- [Custom Audio/Video Capture & Rendering](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/20-advanced-customized-capture-rendering.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 createCustomVideoTrack(), createCustomAudioTrack() for custom capture sources (Canvas/MediaStream) and custom rendering logic.
- [Handle Browser Auto-play Policy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/21-advanced-auto-play-policy.md): Handle Chrome/Safari autoplay restrictions using user gesture triggers or muted autoplay strategies.
- [Use AudioMixer Background Music Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/22-advanced-audio-mixer.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 AudioMixer plugin to play multiple background music tracks with volume control, loop, seek and mixing output.
- [Detect WebRTC Browser Compatibility](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/23-advanced-support-detection.md): Use TRTC.isSupported() to detect WebRTC support, H.264 codec and camera/microphone permissions in browsers.
- [Monitor Network Quality](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/24-advanced-network-quality.md): Listen to trtc-sdk-v5 network-quality event for uplink/downlink latency, packet loss and quality levels (excellent/good/fair/poor/very poor).
- [Listen Device Changes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/25-advanced-device-change.md): Listen to trtc-sdk-v5 device-changed event to handle camera, microphone, speaker plug/unplug and device list changes.
- [Use CDNStreaming Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/26-advanced-publish-cdn-stream.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 CDNStreaming plugin for cloud mixing, CDN streaming and pushing mixed stream back to TRTC room.
- [Use Dual Stream Encoding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/27-advanced-small-stream.md): Use startVideoStream({ small: true }) to enable dual stream, subscribers auto-switch streams based on network for smooth playback in weak network.
- [Use Beauty Professional Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/28-advanced-beauty.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 Beauty plugin for smoothing, whitening, face reshaping, eye enlargement and dynamic stickers (commercial license required).
- [Use Watermark Video Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/29-advanced-water-mark.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 Watermark plugin to add image watermarks to local video streams with position, size and opacity configuration.
- [Use CrossRoom Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/30-advanced-cross-room-link.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 CrossRoom plugin for cross-room audio/video interaction between hosts (PK battles, cross-room co-hosting).
- [TRTC Web SDK Plugins Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/31-advanced-plugins-overview.md): Browse all trtc-sdk-v5 plugins: beauty/virtual background/AI denoiser/voice changer/media mixing/CDN streaming/device detection/network quality and 20+ plugin capabilities.
- [Configure Proxy Server Forwarding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/34-advanced-proxy.md): Use TRTC.setProxyServer() to configure HTTP/HTTPS proxy server for forwarding WebRTC signaling and media traffic.
- [Use AIDenoiser AI Noise Reduction Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/35-advanced-ai-denoiser.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 AIDenoiser plugin to intelligently reduce background noise (keyboard/fan/mouse clicks) with far-field elimination mode.
- [Use VirtualBackground Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/36-advanced-virtual-background.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 VirtualBackground plugin for background blur and custom background image replacement (portrait segmentation).
- [Use VoiceChanger Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/37-advanced-voice-changer.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 VoiceChanger plugin for 11 voice effects: child/little girl/man/cold/ethereal/fatso/foreigner/trapped beast/heavy metal/strong current/heavy machinery.
- [Use TRTCVideoDecoder Fallback Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/39-advanced-video-decoder.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 TRTCVideoDecoder plugin for automatic fallback to software decoding (wasm) when hardware decoding fails.
- [Use VideoMixer Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/40-advanced-video-mixer.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 VideoMixer plugin to mix camera, screen, text, images, video into one stream (PiP/watermark/subtitles).
- [Use SmallStreamAutoSwitcher Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/41-advanced-small-stream-auto-switcher.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 SmallStreamAutoSwitcher plugin to auto-switch to small stream in weak network for smooth playback, auto-switch back to big stream when network recovers.
- [Use RealtimeTranscriber Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/42-advanced-realtime-transcriber.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 RealtimeTranscriber plugin to convert speech to text in real-time with multi-language translation (Chinese/English/Japanese/Korean).
- [Use FaceDetection Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/web/plugin/43-advanced-face-detection.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 FaceDetection plugin to detect face position, count and state changes in camera in real-time.


### TRTC Native SDK API
> TRTC Native SDK API reference covering Android, iOS and C++ platform interfaces.

- [Android TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TRTCCloud.md): View Android TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API: enterRoom()/exitRoom()/startLocalVideo()/startLocalAudio()/switchRoom() methods.
- [Android TRTC SDK TRTCCloudDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TRTCCloudDef.md): View Android TRTC SDK type definitions: TRTCParams (room params)/TRTCVideoEncParam (video encoding)/TRTCNetworkQosParam (network QoS).
- [Android TRTC SDK TRTCCloudListener Event Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TRTCCloudListener.md): View Android TRTC SDK event callbacks: onEnterRoom()/onExitRoom()/onUserVideoAvailable()/onNetworkQuality() listeners.
- [Android TRTC SDK TRTCStatistics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TRTCStatistics.md): View Android TRTC SDK audio/video statistics: bitrate/frame rate/resolution/packet loss/latency data structures.
- [Android TRTC SDK TXAudioEffectManager Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TXAudioEffectManager.md): View Android TRTC SDK audio effect APIs: playBGM()/setVoiceChangerType()/setVoiceReverbType() for BGM, voice changer, reverb.
- [Android TRTC SDK TXBeautyManager Beauty Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TXBeautyManager.md): View Android TRTC SDK beauty APIs: setBeautyLevel()/setWhitenessLevel()/setRuddyLevel() for smoothing, whitening, face reshaping.
- [Android TRTC SDK TXDeviceManager Device Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TXDeviceManager.md): View Android TRTC SDK device management APIs: switchCamera()/setSystemVolumeType()/enableCameraTorch() for camera and audio device control.
- [Android TRTC SDK TXLiteAVCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TXLiteAVCode.md): View Android TRTC SDK error and warning code list to quickly identify room entry failures and stream publishing/subscribing issues.
- [C++ TRTC SDK ITRTCCloud API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/C++/ITRTCCloud.md): View C++ TRTC SDK ITRTCCloud API: enterRoom()/exitRoom()/startLocalVideo()/startLocalAudio() methods.
- [C++ TRTC SDK ITRTCStatistics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/C++/ITRTCStatistics.md): View C++ TRTC SDK audio/video statistics: bitrate/frame rate/resolution/packet loss/latency data structures.
- [C++ TRTC SDK ITXAudioEffectManager Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/C++/ITXAudioEffectManager.md): View C++ TRTC SDK audio effect APIs: playBGM()/setVoiceChangerType()/setVoiceReverbType() for BGM, voice changer, reverb.
- [C++ TRTC SDK ITXDeviceManager Device Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/C++/ITXDeviceManager.md): View C++ TRTC SDK device management APIs: getDevicesList()/setCurrentDevice() for audio/video device enumeration and control.
- [C++ TRTC SDK TRTCCloudCallback Event Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/C++/TRTCCloudCallback.md): View C++ TRTC SDK event callback interface: onEnterRoom()/onExitRoom()/onUserVideoAvailable() callback methods.
- [C++ TRTC SDK TRTCTypeDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/C++/TRTCTypeDef.md): View C++ TRTC SDK type definitions: TRTCParams (room params)/TRTCVideoEncParam (video encoding)/TRTCNetworkQosParam (network QoS).
- [C++ TRTC SDK TXLiteAVCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/C++/TXLiteAVCode.md): View C++ TRTC SDK error and warning code list to quickly identify room entry failures and stream publishing/subscribing issues.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/iOS/TRTCCloud.md): View iOS TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API: enterRoom()/exitRoom()/startLocalVideo()/startLocalAudio()/switchRoom() methods.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TRTCCloudDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/iOS/TRTCCloudDef.md): View iOS TRTC SDK type definitions: TRTCParams (room params)/TRTCVideoEncParam (video encoding)/TRTCNetworkQosParam (network QoS).
- [iOS TRTC SDK TRTCCloudDelegate Event Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/iOS/TRTCCloudDelegate.md): View iOS TRTC SDK event callbacks: onEnterRoom()/onExitRoom()/onUserVideoAvailable()/onNetworkQuality() delegate methods.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TRTCStatistics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/iOS/TRTCStatistics.md): View iOS TRTC SDK audio/video statistics: bitrate/frame rate/resolution/packet loss/latency data structures.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TXAudioEffectManager Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/iOS/TXAudioEffectManager.md): View iOS TRTC SDK audio effect APIs: playBGM()/setVoiceChangerType()/setVoiceReverbType() for BGM, voice changer, reverb.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TXBeautyManager Beauty Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/iOS/TXBeautyManager.md): View iOS TRTC SDK beauty APIs: setBeautyLevel()/setWhitenessLevel()/setRuddyLevel() for smoothing, whitening, face reshaping.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TXDeviceManager Device Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/iOS/TXDeviceManager.md): View iOS TRTC SDK device management APIs: switchCamera()/setSystemVolumeType()/enableCameraTorch() for camera and audio device control.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TXLiteAVCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/iOS/TXLiteAVCode.md): View iOS TRTC SDK error and warning code list to quickly identify room entry failures and stream publishing/subscribing issues.


### Native Live SDK API
> Tencent Cloud Live Native SDK API reference covering pusher, player and global configuration interfaces.

- [Android Live SDK V2TXLiveCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/android/V2TXLiveCode_api_android.md): View Android Live SDK error code list to quickly identify stream pushing failures, pulling exceptions and audio/video capture issues.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLiveDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/android/V2TXLiveDef_api_android.md): View Android Live SDK type definitions: V2TXLiveVideoResolution (resolution)/V2TXLiveVideoFillMode (fill mode)/V2TXLiveRotation (rotation).
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/android/V2TXLivePlayer_api_android.md): View Android Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API: setRenderView()/startLivePlay()/stopPlay()/setPlayoutVolume() stream pulling methods.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePlayerObserver Player Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/android/V2TXLivePlayerObserver_api_android.md): View Android Live SDK player event callbacks: onConnected()/onVideoPlaying()/onAudioPlaying()/onPlayoutVolumeUpdate() listeners.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePremier Global Configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/android/V2TXLivePremier_api_android.md): View Android Live SDK global configuration API: setLicence()/setLogLevel()/setConsoleEnabled() SDK initialization methods.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/android/V2TXLivePusher_api_android.md): View Android Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API: setRenderView()/startCamera()/startMicrophone()/startPush() stream pushing methods.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePusherObserver Pusher Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/android/V2TXLivePusherObserver_api_android.md): View Android Live SDK pusher event callbacks: onPushStatusUpdate()/onCaptureFirstVideoFrame()/onMicrophoneVolumeUpdate() listeners.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLiveCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/flutter/V2TXLiveCode_api_flutter.md): View Flutter Live SDK error code list to quickly identify stream pushing failures, pulling exceptions and audio/video capture issues.
- [Flutter · V2TXLiveDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/flutter/V2TXLiveDef_api_flutter.md): View Flutter Live SDK type definitions.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/flutter/V2TXLivePlayer_api_flutter.md): View Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API: setRenderViewID()/startLivePlay()/stopPlay()/setPlayoutVolume() stream pulling methods.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePlayerObserver Player Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/flutter/V2TXLivePlayerObserver_api_flutter.md): View Flutter Live SDK player event callbacks: onConnected()/onVideoPlaying()/onAudioPlaying()/onPlayoutVolumeUpdate() listeners.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePremier Global Configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/flutter/V2TXLivePremier_api_flutter.md): View Flutter Live SDK global configuration API: setLicence()/setLogConfig() SDK initialization methods.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/flutter/V2TXLivePusher_api_flutter.md): View Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API: setRenderViewID()/startCamera()/startMicrophone()/startPush() stream pushing methods.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePusherObserver Pusher Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/flutter/V2TXLivePusherObserver_api_flutter.md): View Flutter Live SDK pusher event callbacks: onPushStatusUpdate()/onCaptureFirstVideoFrame()/onMicrophoneVolumeUpdate() listeners.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLiveCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/iOS/V2TXLiveCode_api_iOS.md): View iOS Live SDK error code list to quickly identify stream pushing failures, pulling exceptions and audio/video capture issues.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLiveDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/iOS/V2TXLiveDef_api_iOS.md): View iOS Live SDK type definitions: V2TXLiveVideoResolution (resolution)/V2TXLiveVideoFillMode (fill mode)/V2TXLiveRotation (rotation).
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/iOS/V2TXLivePlayer_api_iOS.md): View iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API: setRenderView()/startLivePlay()/stopPlay()/setPlayoutVolume() stream pulling methods.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePlayerObserver Player Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/iOS/V2TXLivePlayerObserver_api_iOS.md): View iOS Live SDK player event callbacks: onConnected()/onVideoPlaying()/onAudioPlaying()/onPlayoutVolumeUpdate() delegate methods.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePremier Global Configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/iOS/V2TXLivePremier_api_iOS.md): View iOS Live SDK global configuration API: setLicence()/setLogLevel()/setConsoleEnabled() SDK initialization methods.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/iOS/V2TXLivePusher_api_iOS.md): View iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API: setRenderView()/startCamera()/startMicrophone()/startPush() stream pushing methods.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePusherObserver Pusher Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native_live/iOS/V2TXLivePusherObserver_api_iOS.md): View iOS Live SDK pusher event callbacks: onPushStatusUpdate()/onCaptureFirstVideoFrame()/onMicrophoneVolumeUpdate() delegate methods.
